author: Yeseong Lim
name: MoE Exploration + Multi-bit Quantization Analysis
blurb: Negative-result non-record submission. The dense control reaches 1.145622 val_bpb, within 0.0028 BPB of the March 20, 2026 leaderboard leader, making the quantization comparison leaderboard-relevant. On that same trained dense model, int5 MLP costs +0.0068 BPB while int4 MLP costs +0.0655 BPB. A partial 8xH100 SXM MoE log (2 experts, soft routing, 1.5x per expert) shows the MoE model trailing the dense control by +0.0057/+0.0100/+0.0139/+0.0157 BPB at steps 500/1000/1500/2000 before the pod died, so the MoE conclusion should be interpreted as preliminary.
